eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Georgia; at 11:32 AM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 5:32 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: We interrupt this program to bring you this important announcement. This is an emergency missing child alert, or Levis Call, the Georgia version of an Amber Alert. The Baxley Police Department and the GEORGIA BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION are looking for a Gray Jeep Renegade Georgia tag SLU9322. On July 16, 2026, Layla Alexia Nubian Carter, a 13 year old black female with black hair with braids and brown eyes and was last seen wearing  Pajama bottoms and a tee shirt. She was abducted by Giavannie Alexis Carter, a 32 year old black female, 5 ft. 2 in. tall weighing140 lbs. with black hair with braids and brown eyes and was last seen wearing a gray and white tank top, black shorts and a black baseball cap with blue trim on the side of the hat. They were last seen at 174 James Drive Baxley Georgia direction of travel is  unknown. If you have any information on the whereabouts of Layla Alexia Nubian Carter, or the Gray Jeep Renegade Georgia tag SLU9322, please dial 911. The public can also provide information to the GBI tip line at 1-800-597-TIPS or the See Send app for smartphone users.
